name: 需求与欲望
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 经济活动 / Economic Systems / Economic Systems
curriculum_points: Students will be able to categorize items as needs or wants and explain how these choices impact personal and community resource allocation. (Age 5-7)
Students will be able to critically examine the influence of culture, advertising, and personal values on perceptions of needs and wants. (Age 9-11)
